# Tokens JSON schema

Schema file: `examples/tokens.schema.json`

Supported top-level blocks: `tokens`, `themes`, `fonts`, `motion`, `zIndex`, `displayP3`.

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "title": "VelinStyle tokens",
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "tokens": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "themes": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "propertyNames": {
        "pattern": "^[a-z0-9-]+$"
      }
    },
    "fonts": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "motion": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "zIndex": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "displayP3": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    }
  }
}
```
